```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#3F3D7E);color:#F8F7F0;padding:0.5em 1.1em;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.25);">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:#FFB84D;">parent</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;">main Claude</span>
 </div>

 <svg viewBox="0 0 320 30" style="width:65%;height:1.5em;display:block;margin:0 auto;" preserveAspectRatio="none">
  <path d="M160,0 L60,28 M160,0 L160,28 M160,0 L260,28" stroke="#C4C3E8" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>
 </svg>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.95em;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.6em;height:1.6em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.3em;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="search" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">research</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">read 12 files</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.6em;height:1.6em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.3em;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="hammer" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">refactor</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">isolated context</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.7em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.6em;height:1.6em;border-radius:0.4em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.3em;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="flask-conical" style="width:0.75em;height:0.75em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">tests</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.4;margin-top:0.2em;">run in parallel</div>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;justify-content:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.55em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border:1px dashed #2C8475;">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#2C8475;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">verifiers</div>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">›</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">test</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">diff</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;color:#2C8475;padding:0.15em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;">log</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">›</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#1F5E54;">confirm "done"</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
